image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: 洁净车间内部. must keep set elements: 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影.
image_prompt_shot: shot S001. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 手机拍摄禁止图标显示在画面中央; 人员站在指定区域听讲解. narration intent: 旁白 explains "车间内涉及工艺、设备和产品信息。未经许可，不得拍照、录像或直播。如需交流问题，请在指定区域进行，不要影响现场人员操作。". shot positive notes: 手机拍摄禁止图标，红色圆圈斜杠，清晰醒目，人员站在黄色指定区域线内，背景为洁净车间，讲解员手势引导，柔和照明，工业风格.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: 洁净车间内部. must keep set elements: 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影. shot S001. camera intent: comic_panel_02. action beats: 手机拍摄禁止图标显示在画面中央; 人员站在指定区域听讲解. narration intent: 旁白 explains "车间内涉及工艺、设备和产品信息。未经许可，不得拍照、录像或直播。如需交流问题，请在指定区域进行，不要影响现场人员操作。". shot positive notes: 手机拍摄禁止图标，红色圆圈斜杠，清晰醒目，人员站在黄色指定区域线内，背景为洁净车间，讲解员手势引导，柔和照明，工业风格.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱线缆, 溢出液体, 敞开门, 无标识区域, 模糊，杂乱，阴影过重, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 车间内涉及工艺、设备和产品信息。未经许可，不得拍照、录像或直播。如需交流问题，请在指定区域进行，不要影响现场人员操作。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
